title: Experimentation Analysis Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger experimentation analysis foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Experimentation Analysis Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Experimentation Analysis Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good experimentation analysis foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Experimentation Analysis Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
